calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-24-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jian Xiao, (no information provided) Petitioner in propria persona.
Rebecca Chau, Cantonese Interpreter, interpreting for Plaintiff.
Lucia Li, Esq. (415.510.3478; Lucia.Li@doj.ca.gov) Deputy Attorney General for Respondent via Zoom.

ARGUED The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD'S Motion To Dismiss:

Respondent's unopposed "motion to dismiss" is granted.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling, including some facts of the case and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion
Off Calendar Aug-17-2022 Continued To Aug-24-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Zoom Conference
Jian Xiao, 415-823-4754; thomasxiao123@gmail.com for Petitioner in Pro Per,
LUCIA Q. LI, Esq., Deputy Attorney General, (415) 510-3478, Lucia.Li@doj.ca.gov, for Respondent California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board

Petitioner did not properly contest the Court's tentative ruling or provide notice that he would be appearing for today's hearing. Petitioner did not speak English. Dpeuty Court Clerk, Vera Mu, assisted the Petitioner in Cantonese.

The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD'S Motion To Dismiss is contiineud to August 24, 2022. Cantonese Interperter is requested.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
